results.title: ‘Masterpiece’ movie that is ‘best war film of all time’ and streaming on Amazon Prime
results.description: This war epic has an impressive 92% rating on Rotten Tomatoes.

results.title: Makers of Ilaiyaraaja biopic unveil AI-powered tribute video celebrating 50 years of musical legacy
results.description: AI Tribute Video: Dive into Ilaiyaraaja's 50-year cinematic legacy, with a special AI-powered video celebrating this iconic composer’s contribution to Indian cinema. See how technology and emotion blend in this heartfelt tribute.

results.title: Cannes Film Festival: Barbra Streisand to receive Palme d'Or
results.description: The 79th Cannes Film Festival draws to a close Saturday with the presentation of one of cinema’s highest honors, the Palme d’Or.
